name: 170th Secret Coin
description: A port of Colon's 2021 April Fools mod.

can-type-clubstep.name: Clubstep Code
can-type-clubstep.description: When enabled, you may enter the Clubstep code. Auto-enabled by mod after talking to RobTop.

coin-unlocked.name: Coin Unlocked
coin-unlocked.description: When enabled, the coin shows up in the Basement. Automatically toggles on once you re-open the game after seeing the black text.

typed-clubstep.name: Black Screen
typed-clubstep.description: When enabled, next time you open the main menu, the screen turns black and text shows up. Auto-enabled by mod.
